ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_items" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content item */,
  "content_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was created or published */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker or presenter */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Video, Live Stream, Product Offer) */,
  "watch_link" TEXT /* Link to watch the content */,
  "product_offer" TEXT /* Product offer associated with the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the content has received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate from the product offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the content belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the content is hosted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the content item */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the content */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the transcript of the content */,
  "closed_caption_url" TEXT /* URL to the closed captions of the content */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is a live stream */,
  "scheduled_start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time for live streams */,
  "scheduled_end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time for live streams */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the content */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was approved */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is archived */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Content Creator, Speaker) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product offer */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the product offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product offer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the product offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the product offer */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item associated with the product offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product offer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the content was viewed */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the content was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)
